title: Google for Nonprofits
description: Google for Nonprofits provides eligible nonprofit or social-impact organizations with software donations, nonprofit discounts, fundraising tools, communications tools, productivity tools, security tools under its current published program terms.
eligibility: Organizations must satisfy the provider's current nonprofit-status verification, acceptable-use, product, and regional requirements.
value: Access to Google Workspace nonprofit editions, Google Ad Grants, YouTube nonprofit features, and other approved nonprofit products.
